  "findings": [
    "Fillet weld size is undersized compared to the design drawing callout as verified by weld gauge measurement."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Issue a non-conformance report (NCR).",
    "Clean the weld area and deposit additional weld metal to meet the minimum required fillet weld size per AWS D1.1."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under AWS D1.1, structural fillet welds must meet the minimum size specified in the design drawings. An undersized fillet weld reduces the effective throat and load-carrying capacity of the joint, presenting a structural risk that requires remediation before final inspection sign-off.",
  "references": [
    "AWS D1.1 Structural Welding Code - Steel"
  ]
